content.full_text:
June 27, 1991

Mr. Mark Morodomi, Esq.
Fair Political Practices Commission
428 "J" Street, Suite 800
P.O. Box 807
Sacramento, CA 95804-0807

Dear Mr. Morodomi,

Thank you for your quick response and assistance in answering my inquiry. Following up on our telephone discussion of June 26, 1991, I wish to confirm my understanding with you.

My original question was regarding the applicability of the provisions of California Government Code section number 84308 to contributions made to the various "Office Holder" accounts used by Los Angeles City officials to raise funds for non-campaign purposes.

It is my understanding from our discussion that the provisions of section 84308 apply fully to contributions to the Office Holder accounts and no exception to that applicability is made because the contributions cannot be used for election campaign purposes.

If you do not agree with my understanding of the discussion, please let me know at your earliest convenience.

Very truly yours,

DANIEL, MANN, JOHNSON, & MENDENHALL

Jack V. Houser
Manager of Contracts
